utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 sections. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: (1) health_coverage: explicitly states physical and mental health insurance with named plans and combined cost (€80/month) — fully specified with costs. (2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with a named plan and cost (€90/month) — fully specified with costs. (3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with a named plan and cost (€115/month) — fully specified with costs. (4) additional_services: includes professional_liability but only as 'Estimated €30/month' — it lacks a specific plan/provider detail; however, the format only requires 'any enhancement services with costs'; the cost is provided, so it counts as included. (5) total_budget: provided as €315/month — included. Therefore, all 5 items are present and meet the specified details requirement for costs; additional_services has cost but not plan name, yet the format only mandates services with costs, so it is acceptable.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each selected plan in the final coverage plan to the exact item name in the ground-truth ratings and extract its numerical rating. The final plan includes: MedSecure Basic Plan (physical health), CareCo Basic Plan (mental health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (home/contents), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). We then look up each of these items in their respective sections and record the provided rating numbers.
